<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep the diff as small as the change allows. -->

## What & why

What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any related issue
(`Fixes #123`).

## Type

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` — no behavior change

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named `feature/…`, `fix/…`, or `chore/…`
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
- [ ] One concern per PR; docs updated alongside any behavior change
- [ ] I did **not** weaken a gate, auto-approve a human-decision point, or remove
      the audit trail (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or private vault contents are included
